title: SAST + Supply Chain E2E Scanner — Real Repo Testing & Result Persistence
description: test_e2e_famous_repos.py defines 10 real GitHub repos as test subjects. test_sast_engine.py and test_supply_chain.py confirm the scanning engines exist. However the E2E test suite clones repos at test time (slow, fragile), SAST findings are not persisted to the vuln_lifecycle state machine, and supply-chain attack detections have no automatic SBOM correlation step.
missing: Cache cloned repos in .fixops_data/repo-cache/ with git fetch --depth=1 updates so E2E tests run in <30s without re-cloning
Auto-persist SAST findings into vuln_lifecycle.db on scan completion so DISCOVERED→TRIAGED transitions happen immediately for CI-triggered scans
Wire supply-chain findings to SBOM export: when a malicious/vulnerable package is detected, auto-generate a CycloneDX diff and attach to the finding
